data.title: Daiseki Eco. Solution Exceeds Financial Forecasts for FY 2025
data.description:
Daiseki Eco.Solution Co., Ltd. ( (JP:1712) ) has shared an update.

Daiseki Eco. Solution Co., Ltd. reported that its actual financial results for the fiscal year ended February 28, 2025, exceeded its forecasted results. This positive outcome was primarily driven by strong performance in its Soil Investigation and Measures Business, particularly in the Kanto and Kansai regions, and successful high value-added projects. Despite a slight decrease in profit attributable to owners of the parent, the company’s net sales and operating profit surpassed expectations, indicating robust business operations and strategic market positioning.

More about Daiseki Eco.Solution Co., Ltd.

Daiseki Eco. Solution Co., Ltd. operates in the environmental solutions industry, focusing on soil investigation and treatment services. The company is listed on the Tokyo and Nagoya Stock Exchanges and engages in high value-added projects, including consulting and collaborative efforts with Daiseki Co., Ltd.

YTD Price Performance: -26.10%

Average Trading Volume: 46,031

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen16.8B

data.title: De Grey Mining Ltd Faces Acquisition by Northern Star Resources
data.description:
De Grey Mining Ltd ( (AU:DEG) ) just unveiled an update.

De Grey Mining Ltd has announced a proposed acquisition by Northern Star Resources Ltd, where Northern Star will acquire 100% of De Grey’s shares through a Court-approved scheme of arrangement. The Scheme Meeting, held to vote on this proposal, is a significant step in the acquisition process, with the results to be communicated to the ASX. This acquisition could impact De Grey’s operations and market positioning, potentially benefiting stakeholders by aligning with Northern Star’s resources and strategic objectives.

More about De Grey Mining Ltd

De Grey Mining Ltd is a mining company primarily focused on gold exploration and development. The company operates in the Pilbara region of Western Australia, with significant projects such as the Hemi Project.

data.title: West Cobar Metals Achieves High-Grade Antimony Precipitation at Bulla Park
data.description:
An announcement from West Cobar Metals Ltd. ( (AU:WC1) ) is now available.

West Cobar Metals Limited has announced positive metallurgical results from its Bulla Park project, highlighting the successful precipitation of high-grade antimony sulphide from leach liquor. This development indicates the feasibility of a straightforward processing method for extracting antimony, copper, and silver, with high recovery rates achieved in preliminary testwork. The results bolster confidence in the project’s potential and suggest further optimization could enhance these outcomes, potentially impacting the company’s operational efficiency and market positioning.

More about West Cobar Metals Ltd.

West Cobar Metals Limited is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. Its primary products include copper, antimony, and silver, with a significant market focus on the Bulla Park project in New South Wales, Australia.

data.title: Yamazen Corporation Announces Board of Directors Changes
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Yamazen Corporation ( (JP:8051) ).

Yamazen Corporation has announced a change in its board of directors, effective June 24, 2025. Shinichi Kiyohara will be appointed as a Director and full-time Audit and Supervisory Committee Member, while Yuji Nagao and Satoshi Murai will retire from their positions. This reshuffling is part of the company’s ongoing efforts to strengthen its governance structure and ensure effective oversight, which could impact its strategic direction and stakeholder relationships.

More about Yamazen Corporation

data.title: Bluglass Limited Announces Cessation of Performance Rights
data.description:
The latest update is out from Bluglass Limited ( (AU:BLG) ).

Bluglass Limited announced the cessation of 2,406,196 performance rights due to the lapse of conditional rights, as the conditions were not met or became incapable of being satisfied. This development may impact the company’s capital structure and could influence stakeholder perceptions regarding the company’s operational targets and strategic goals.

data.title: Basin Energy Director Increases Shareholding
data.description:
Basin Energy Limited ( (AU:BSN) ) has provided an update.

Basin Energy Limited announced a change in the director’s interest, with Andrew Moorhouse acquiring an additional 325,000 fully paid ordinary shares through an on-market purchase. This acquisition increases Moorhouse’s total holdings to 749,725 shares, alongside existing options and performance rights, reflecting a strategic investment move that may influence the company’s governance and shareholder dynamics.

More about Basin Energy Limited

Basin Energy Limited operates in the energy sector, focusing on the exploration and development of energy resources. The company is involved in the acquisition and management of energy assets, with a market focus on expanding its portfolio of energy resources.

data.title: Sipa Resources Explores Rare Earth Potential at Wolfe Basin
data.description:
Sipa Resources Limited ( (AU:SRI) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Sipa Resources Limited has announced an evaluation of the rare earth element potential at its Wolfe Basin Project, which spans 780 square kilometers and is adjacent to Rare X Limited’s Cummins Range Rare Earth Project. Historically focused on base metals, the project is now being reviewed for its potential to host rare earth elements and gallium, particularly in its underexplored southern area. This strategic shift could enhance Sipa’s positioning in the rare earth market, potentially impacting its operations and offering new opportunities for stakeholders.

More about Sipa Resources Limited

Sipa Resources Limited is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. Its primary focus includes base metals such as copper, lead, and zinc, as well as rare earth elements and gallium. The company is actively exploring the Wolfe Basin Project in the Kimberley region of Western Australia, which is known for its potential in large-scale sediment-hosted mineralization.

Average Trading Volume: 835,757

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Westpac Announces Cessation of Securities in On-Market Buy-Back
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Westpac Banking ( (AU:WBC) ).

Westpac Banking Corporation has announced the cessation of 497,280 ordinary fully paid securities as part of an on-market buy-back, effective from April 2, 2025. This move is part of the company’s capital management strategy, potentially impacting its share value and market positioning, and reflects its ongoing efforts to optimize shareholder returns.

More about Westpac Banking

Westpac Banking Corporation is a prominent financial services provider in the banking industry, offering a range of products and services including personal banking, business banking, and wealth management. The company primarily focuses on the Australian market and is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange under the code WBC.

data.title: AsiaPhos Limited Ends Quarterly Financial Reporting
data.description:
AsiaPhos Limited ( (SG:5WV) ) just unveiled an announcement.

AsiaPhos Limited has announced the cessation of its quarterly financial reporting, following an unqualified audit opinion from its current auditor, PKF-CAP LLP, for the financial year 2024. This change aligns with the Catalist Rules, as the company is no longer under the obligation to report quarterly due to the removal of a previous disclaimer of opinion by its former auditor. The company will now report semi-annually, with the next financial statement release scheduled for the period ending 30 June 2025. The Board assures stakeholders of continued transparency and adherence to corporate governance standards.

More about AsiaPhos Limited

AsiaPhos Limited is a company involved in the phosphate industry, focusing on the production and supply of phosphate-based products. The company operates through its subsidiaries and is listed on the Singapore Exchange, targeting markets that require phosphate materials.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: S$5.92M

data.title: Greater Bay Area Dynamic Growth Holding Limited Announces Change in Bermuda Share Registrar
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Greater Bay Area Dynamic Growth Holding Limited ( (HK:1189) ).

Greater Bay Area Dynamic Growth Holding Limited has announced a change in its Bermuda principal share registrar and transfer agent to Appleby Global Corporate Services (Bermuda) Limited, effective from January 1, 2025. The company’s branch share registrar and transfer office in Hong Kong will continue to be maintained by Tricor Secretaries Limited. This change reflects the company’s ongoing efforts to streamline its operations and could potentially impact its administrative processes and stakeholder interactions.
